name: sanity-check
description: A background agent that validates code, configuration, and deployments for correctness. It checks syntax, lint rules, type safety, environment variables, and deployment readiness.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression (e.g. 1=1) to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: lint
skills.description: Runs lint checks on a given codebase and returns violations

skills.name: typecheck
skills.description: Runs type-checking (tsc, mypy, etc.) and returns type errors

skills.name: env-validate
skills.description: Checks that required environment variables are present and well-formed

skills.name: config-check
skills.description: Validates project configuration files (JSON, YAML, TOML) for syntax and schema

skills.name: deploy-readiness
skills.description: Checks if a project is ready for deployment
